# Lone Star Sheds LLC
> Premium handcrafted sheds, barns, cabins, garages, and portable buildings built in Texas. Serving Central and East Texas with 14 dealership locations. 50-year siding warranty and rent-to-own financing available.

## Company Overview
- Name: Lone Star Sheds LLC
- Website: https://lonestarshedsllc.com
- Industry: Portable Buildings & Custom Outdoor Structures
- Service Area: Central and East Texas
- Headquarters: Commerce, TX
- Contact Email: lavern@lonestarshedsllc.com
- Primary Phone: (903) 886-0307

## Product Categories

### Barns
Gambrel-roof storage buildings with dual overhead lofts. Available in Painted LP SmartSide, Hardie Plank, and Painted Dutchlap siding. Sizes from 8x12 to 18x60. Starting at $2,599.
- Painted Lofted Barn
- Low Wall Barn (most economical option)
- Hardie Lofted Barn
- Hardie Side Lofted Barn
- Painted Dutchlap Lofted Barn
- Side Lofted Painted Barn
- Painted Dutchlap Side Lofted Barn

### Garages
Heavy-duty buildings with roll-up steel doors, solid steel entry doors, 12" on-center treated floor joists, and diamond plate thresholds. Sizes from 12x20 to 18x60. Starting at $8,799.
- Hardie Lofted Garage
- Hardie Utility Garage
- Painted Dutchlap Lofted Garage
- Painted Dutchlap Utility Garage
- Painted Utility Garage
- Painted Lofted Garage

### Cabins
Cabin-style buildings with covered front porches, 9-lite residential doors, and screened windows. Perfect for guest houses, offices, and studios. Sizes from 8x16 to 18x60. Starting at $5,799.
- Hardie B&B Utility Cabin
- Hardie Lofted Cabin
- Hardie Utility Cabin
- Painted Utility Cabin
- Painted Lofted Cabin
- Painted Dutchlap Lofted Cabin
- Lofted Cabin
- Utility Cabin

### Utility Buildings
Versatile storage and workshop buildings with double crossbuck doors and side windows. Sizes from 8x12 to 18x60. Starting at $3,579.
- Painted Dutchlap Utility
- Painted Side Utility
- Hardie Side Utility
- Painted Dutchlap Side Utility

### Cottages
Premium large-format residential-style buildings for recreational use, temporary living, or deluxe studio space. Contact for pricing.
- Cottage 1668 (side porch layout)
- Cottage 1678 (architectural dormer)

### Deluxe Buildings
Premium buildings featuring signature arched glass double doors, two-tone wainscot siding, and premium trim details. Starting at $4,479.
- Hardie Side Lofted Deluxe
- Hardie Side Utility Deluxe
- Painted Dutchlap Side Utility Deluxe
- Side Lofted Deluxe

## Key Features & Specifications
- Siding Options: LP SmartSide (50-year warranty), Hardie Plank (cement board), Painted Dutchlap
- Roofing: Durable metal roofing in multiple colors
- Flooring: 5/8" tongue and groove
- Stud Spacing: 16" on-center
- Runners: Pressure-treated 4x6 runners
- Delivery: Free within 50 miles of dealerships using specialized "Mule" delivery system

## Financing
- Cash Purchase available
- Rent-to-Own: 36-month and 60-month terms, no credit check required
- Partner: LightStream personal loans for larger projects

## FAQ
- Do I need a concrete slab? No. Buildings are placed on pressure-treated 4x6 runners and leveled with concrete patio blocks. A gravel pad is recommended but not required.
- What delivery clearance is needed? A clear path at least 2 feet wider than the building and 14 feet of overhead clearance.
- Is rent-to-own available? Yes, with no credit check. Available in 36-month and 60-month terms.
- What warranty is included? LP SmartSide siding includes a 50-year warranty against rot and decay.
